items.title: ‘Sickening and greedy’: California millionaire slams Larry Page and Sergey Brin for cutting ties with the state to avoid wealth tax
items.description: As billionaires flee the state to avoid the proposed wealth tax, other high earners support the one-time tax.

items.title: Cerebras scores OpenAI deal worth over $10 billion ahead of AI chipmaker's IPO
items.description: The deal will help diversify Cerebras away from the United Arab Emirates G42, which accounted for 87% of revenue in the first half of 2024.

items.title: ASML's Installed Base Management Business Picks Up: What's Driving it?
items.description: ASML Holding's IBM business is gaining momentum in 2025, driven by system upgrades, expanding EUV adoption, and rising service revenues.

items.title: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights NVIDIA, Lockheed Martin, IBM, Microsoft and Palantir
items.description: NVIDIA anchors a 2026 investment thesis built on AI infrastructure, defense spending and quantum priorities reshaping global tech markets.

items.title: OpenAI Forges Multibillion-Dollar Computing Partnership With Cerebras
